---
title: "Removals, post- de-duplication"
author: "Cindy J. Pang"
date: "2026-03-04"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry: margin=1in
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
    keep-tex: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
rm(list=ls()) 
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(arrow)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# read and process data
removals_counts <- read_feather(here::here("data/ice-counts/removals-weekly-counts.feather"))|>
  rename(n_original = n)
removals_drop_dup <- read_feather(here::here("data/ice-counts/removals-weekly-counts-drop-duplicates.feather"))|>
  rename(n_drop_duplicates = n)

removals_comparison <- merge(removals_counts, 
                            removals_drop_dup, 
                            by = c("year_week", "week_start"), 
                            all = TRUE)

removals_comparison <- removals_comparison |>
  mutate(n_drop = n_original - n_drop_duplicates)
```

# Number of Dropped Observations  
```{r}
ggplot(removals_comparison, aes(x = week_start, y = n_drop)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkgreen") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Plot of Removals (post-duplication drops)  
```{r}
ggplot(removals_comparison, aes(x = week_start, y = n_drop_duplicates)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Original  
```{r}
ggplot(removals_comparison, aes(x = week_start, y = n_original)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Comparison Table  
```{r}
knitr::kable(removals_comparison, col.names = c("Year-Week", "Week Start", "Original Counts", "De-duplicated Counts", "# Dropped Observations"))
```
